title: cpvp essential
description: Low fire, Small pop, Small shield, Clear water, Brighter nether, No cave sounds, Full bright, No fog, Unobtrusive rain, Unobtrusive snow, No pumpkin overlay, No explosion particles, No smoke on fire, Reduced hit particles and crit particles, small totem.
body:
Low fire, Small pop, Small shield, Clear water, Brighter nether, No cave sounds, Full bright, No fog, Unobtrusive rain, Unobtrusive snow, No pumpkin overlay, No explosion particles, No smoke on fire, Reduced hit particles and crit particles, small totem , Gui icons, No block breaking particles, Quiet explosions
